final:
module audio_mixer (
    input [15:0] mixer_A,  // 16-bit audio signal mixer_A
    input [15:0] B,  // 16-bit audio signal B
    input S,         // Select signal
    output [15:0] Y  // Output audio signal
);
    assign Y = (S == 1'b0) ? mixer_A : B; // Select mixer_A or B based on S
endmodule
